archetypes.name: Fighter
archetypes.unique_anchor: compact aerospace fuselage built around a single bubble cockpit canopy mounted at the very nose, with a clearly readable swept delta or trapezoidal main wing planform — silhouette is unmistakably a single-pilot fighter, not a capital ship
archetypes.silhouette: compact aerospace fuselage, single cockpit canopy set far forward, swept main wing surfaces with conformal hardpoints, twin canted vertical stabilizer fins at the tail, twin large rear thruster bells
features_pool: single bubble cockpit canopy set far forward
swept-back delta or trapezoidal main wing surfaces
twin canted vertical stabilizer fins
underwing conformal hardpoint pylons
twin oversized afterburner thruster nozzles flanking the tail
chin-mounted forward sensor pod
wingtip reaction-control vernier thruster clusters
nose-cone forward radome with painted unit identification markings
archetypes.scale_note: small craft — single-pilot scale, comparable in length to a contemporary jet fighter

archetypes.name: Corvette
archetypes.role: small fast multi-role escort space warship
archetypes.unique_anchor: narrow gun-barrel hull profile — overall length-to-width ratio is extreme, like a single rifle barrel stretched in space, with a single continuous dorsal gun spine running nose-to-tail
archetypes.silhouette: elongated narrow armored hull oriented along its long axis, blocky forward command block stepped up from the dorsal spine, armored aft engine block with thruster bells partially recessed into the armor
features_pool: low-profile stepped armored command block forward, integrated into the dorsal hull
dorsal turret battery row with cylindrical cannon turrets
ventral sensor blister
armored aft engine block with quad main thruster bells partially recessed into the armor plate
side-mounted reaction-control vernier clusters
amidships antenna mast with multiple radar dishes
armored bow with reinforced ram prow

archetypes.name: Frigate
archetypes.role: medium escort and patrol space warship
archetypes.unique_anchor: wedge-shaped armored bow projecting aggressively forward like a chisel point, with prominent flank sponsons bulging outboard from the midsection and a clearly raised aft superstructure block — the silhouette reads as 'arrowhead with shoulders'
archetypes.silhouette: wedge-shaped armored hull projecting forward, raised aft superstructure block, prominent armored bow ram prow, twin side hangar sponsons or flank turret sponsons
features_pool: armored wedge-shaped bow with ram prow
twin-tier aft superstructure block with horizontal viewport bands
side sponson turret mounts running along the flanks
armored aft engine block housing four to six main drive bells partially recessed into the armor
communications mast cluster on the dorsal spine
ventral missile silo grid line
low-profile armored command block with horizontal viewport slits

archetypes.name: Cruiser
archetypes.role: main-line capital space warship and squadron flagship
archetypes.unique_anchor: tiered stepped armored superstructure rising in two or three distinct vertical stages from the dorsal spine amidships, with stacked broadside turret rows on each tier — silhouette reads as a layered armored fortress, longer and more massive than a frigate but lacking battleship-scale main turrets fore and aft
archetypes.silhouette: broad armored hull with a layered tiered armored superstructure block rising from the dorsal spine, multiple gun turret tiers, massive armored aft engine block with recessed thruster bells
features_pool: tiered main beam-cannon turret batteries on the dorsal spine
armored stepped command block amidships, integrated into the hull rather than perched on top
side broadside cannon turret rows
massive armored aft engine block with six or more main thruster bells partially recessed into a thick armored mounting plate
dorsal radar dome cluster
armor belt with riveted plating along the flanks
secondary anti-fighter turret rings ringing the upper hull
archetypes.scale_note: large space warship, kilometer-scale capital vessel

archetypes.name: Battleship
archetypes.unique_anchor: triple-barrel main beam-cannon turrets mounted both fore AND aft (a defining battleship signature absent on cruisers), plus a tall vertically-rising armored command citadel — overall mass and turret armament dwarfs a cruiser
archetypes.silhouette: massive armored hull with a tall armored command block rising vertically from the dorsal spine, triple-barrel main turrets fore and aft, armored citadel amidships, armored aft mega-engine block with recessed thruster bells
features_pool: triple-barrel main beam-cannon turrets fore and aft
tall stepped armored command block with banded horizontal viewport tiers
armored citadel midsection with bolted rivet courses
rows of secondary anti-fighter turrets along the flanks
armored bow with massive ram prow and forward-mounted prow main cannon
massive armored aft mega-engine block with eight or more main thruster bells partially recessed into a thick armored mounting plate
fleet command antenna mast cluster

archetypes.name: Carrier
archetypes.role: modular bipedal-machine carrier — a space WARSHIP that carries and launches piloted bipedal combat machines via forward-firing catapults, NOT a real-world ocean-going aircraft carrier
archetypes.unique_anchor: vertically-thick armored hull whose forward third splits into a wide longitudinal launch channel running fore-to-aft along the centerline, exiting face-first out the bow opening — the channel is the single defining visual feature
archetypes.silhouette: vertically-thick block-shaped armored hull with a longitudinal forward launch channel along the centerline, two outboard hangar sponsons running parallel along the flanks, low-profile dorsal command block flush with the hull, armored aft engine block with thruster bells recessed into the armor
features_pool: longitudinal forward launch channel running along the centerline of the bow
centerline forward catapult tunnel exiting face-first out the bow opening
low-profile stepped armored command block integrated flush into the dorsal spine, with horizontal viewport bands
two outboard modular hangar sponsons running parallel along the flanks, each with its own forward catapult exit

armored aft engine block — a thick armored mounting plate housing four to eight large thruster bells partially recessed into the armor, with internal framework only glimpsed through armor cutouts and access panels
dorsal beam-cannon turret pair amidships
armor belt with riveted plating, asymmetric bolt-on hangar modules
secondary missile launcher recesses along the flanks
antenna cluster and recessed conduit greebles set into the upper hull armor
archetypes.scale_note: large space warship carrier class, kilometer-scale, designed to deploy bipedal combat machines via forward-firing bow catapults

archetypes.name: Freighter
archetypes.unique_anchor: dorsal spine dominated by a long stack of modular standardized shipping container racks — the cargo containers are the single dominant visual mass, dwarfing the small forward crew habitat and the rear engine block
archetypes.silhouette: blocky utilitarian hull with modular cargo container racks stacked along the spine, small offset forward crew habitat module, oversized aft industrial engine block with exposed thruster bells
features_pool: modular cargo container racks stacked along the spine
small offset crew habitat module forward
oversized industrial aft engine block with multiple exposed thruster bells
exposed structural truss frame
loading crane arms folded against the hull
external piping and conduit runs
civilian hazard stripe markings and corporate livery
archetypes.scale_note: large civilian space freighter, freight hauler class

archetypes.name: Mining / Industrial
archetypes.role: asteroid mining and industrial work space vessel
archetypes.unique_anchor: massive asymmetric forward ore-processing maw or rotating grinder intake dominating the bow, flanked by exposed articulated industrial work arms — function-driven asymmetry is the defining read
archetypes.silhouette: asymmetric utilitarian rig, large forward processing maw or grinder intake, exposed articulated work arms, attached refinery tanks and silos, exposed rear thruster cluster
features_pool: massive forward ore-processing intake jaw or rotating grinder maw
articulated industrial work arms with grippers
external refinery tanks and silos bolted to the hull
exposed pipework and conveyor runs
asymmetric utility platforms welded onto the hull
heavy reinforced collision bumper bow
rotating sorting drum amidships
archetypes.scale_note: medium industrial space vessel, function over form

variants.descriptor: STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Block-II refit — additional bolted-on armor panels, upgraded sensor mast, visible mid-life modernization seams.
STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Civilian conversion — turrets removed or faired over, additional cargo blisters and viewport rows added, civilian livery panel layout.
STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Pirate conversion — mismatched salvaged armor patches, jury-rigged extra weapon mounts welded on, asymmetric bolt-on hull modifications and exposed cabling.
STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Stealth configuration — flush faceted radar-absorbent paneling, recessed vents, no protruding antennas, minimal external greebles.

STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Prototype — exposed test instrumentation harnesses, unpainted primer-grey panels alongside finished sections, hand-stenciled trial unit markings, visible experimental sensor pods bolted to non-standard locations.

STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Ceremonial flagship livery — ornate dress paneling and gilded trim along the armor belt, oversized fleet command antenna mast, ceremonial banners or insignia plates affixed to the dorsal hull, polished parade-ground finish on all visible surfaces.

STRUCTURAL VARIANT: Heavily battle-damaged — torn armor plating with jagged edges, exposed internal frame structure in damaged sections, scorched and blackened paint around impact zones, missing turrets or antenna stubs, makeshift welded patch repairs over hull breaches.
